description_long: This camper features a boxy, utilitarian design with a two-tone exterior: a pale blue upper section and a beige lower section, both showing signs of weathering and dirt. The front is dominated by a large, slanted windshield with two round headlights and a subtle grill below. The sides display graffiti-like markings, rectangular windows, and a single entry door on the right, while the rear has a fold-down metal step and two small, round taillights. The roof is equipped with several small, raised fixtures and a central antenna or cable extending upward. The camper sits on a flat base, with visible wheel wells and mechanical details suggesting retractable steps or stabilizers. The overall appearance is rugged and slightly worn, suitable for urban exploration or street-side parking.
description: A boxy, weathered camper with a blue and beige exterior, large front windshield, graffiti markings, and a single side entry door. The roof features raised fixtures and an antenna, while the rear has a fold-down step and round taillights.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large slanted windshield, two round headlights, and the blue upper with beige lower body.
description_view_1: Right side view highlighting graffiti, two rectangular windows, and the single entry door near the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view with a fold-down metal step, two small round taillights, and the flat back surface.
description_view_3: Left side view with graffiti, two rectangular windows, and no visible door.
attribute_window_configuration: two rectangular windows on each side, one large slanted front windshield
attribute_door_placement: single entry door on the right side near the rear
